generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about civil defense spending, but honestly, the real threat is how unprepared our communities are for emergencies. My neighbor's town had a drill last year - basic stuff like emergency shelters and communication plans - and it made all the difference in their confidence. We shouldn't cut corners on this. #CommunitySafetyFirst
